news-global-econ.description:

news-global-econ.title: Canada's Newly Diversified Military Fights Itself
news-global-econ.description:
Canada's economic policy of mass migration is causing diverse ethnic and sexual conflicts within Canada's army, according to a leaked military report.
The post Canada’s Newly Diversified Military Fights Itself appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: DOJ sues New Jersey over laws giving illegal aliens in-state tuition, says citizens treated as 'second-class'
news-global-econ.description: The DOJ sued New Jersey over laws allowing illegal aliens to receive in-state tuition and financial aid, arguing they discriminate against citizens.

news-global-econ.title: Global famine fears rise as Hormuz crisis threatens ‘eight-year' Suez-scale disruption
news-global-econ.description: Global famine fears are rising as the Strait of Hormuz crisis strains food supply chains, drives up fertilizer prices and threatens harvests worldwide.

news-global-econ.title: Blumenthal: Trump Is Threatening NATO Like a 'Five Year Old'
news-global-econ.description:
Thursday on CNN's "OutFront," Sen. Richard Blumenthal (D-CT) said President Donald Trump was threatening NATO "like a five-year-old."

news-global-soc.title: Nina Dobrev, Martha Stewart turn heads at King Charles’ star-studded charity gala
news-global-soc.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla hosted the King's Trust Global Gala at Christie's New York, drawing Hollywood stars to celebrate the charity's 50th year.

news-global-soc.title: China Claims to Find Substantial Domestic Oil and Gas Fields
news-global-soc.description:
The Chinese Communist Party announced on Wednesday that it had dramatically expanded the scope of the country's known oil and gas reserves, claiming to have found 225 "large and medium-sized crude oil and natural gas fields" between 2021 and 2025.

news-global-soc.title: Nolte: ‘Michael’ Sequel Could Start Shooting This Year
news-global-soc.description:
